description: Tests 2D/3D viewer rendering, dose overlay, mask display, and UI interaction. These cover bugs that were actually found and fixed (dose overlay scroll, LPI mask orientation, DVH flicker, 3D pipeline).

cases.input: Is the dose overlay visible on the current slice?
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify 2D dose layer renders correctly. Mechanism: dose overlay displays on CT. Verification: Check dose overlay visibility description in response. This is the core function of the dose overlay scroll bug fixed on 2026-06-15.

cases.input: What does the 3D view show after planning?
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify 3D scene correctly loads CTV mesh. Mechanism: 3D viewer displays tumor and seed points. Verification: Check 3D/CTV/mesh keywords in response.
Purpose: Verify dose opacity is adjustable. Mechanism: User can control dose overlay display opacity. Verification: Check opacity parameter setting confirmation in response.

cases.input: Are the mask labels showing in the correct anatomical direction?
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify LPI direction mask labels are correct. Mechanism: Three anatomical direction labels (axial/sagittal/coronal) display correctly. Verification: Check three direction labels in response. This is the mask orientation function verified on 2026-06-13.
Purpose: Verify DVH curve display. Mechanism: DVH panel shows dose-volume histograms for multiple organs. Verification: Check DVH-related description in response.

cases.input: What is the current slice position in all three views?
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify three-view slice synchronization. Mechanism: Viewers in three directions show current slice position. Verification: Check response contains slice info for all three directions.

cases.input: Show me the data tree for this case
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify data tree panel display. Mechanism: Data tree shows organ list and control options. Verification: Check data tree related description in response.

cases.input: What organs are shown in the data tree?
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify organ control panel has real organ data. Mechanism: Data tree lists at least 3 real organ names. Verification: Check response contains actual organ names like liver/pancreas.

cases.input: Is the colorbar visible with the dose overlay?
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify colorbar display. Mechanism: Colorbar next to dose overlay shows dose range. Verification: Check colorbar and Gy units in response.

cases.input: What is the dose range shown in the colorbar?
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify colorbar range is reasonable. Mechanism: Colorbar shows specific dose range values. Verification: Check response has min/max Gy values.

cases.input: Can I toggle individual organ visibility in the data tree?
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify organ toggle function exists. Mechanism: Each organ in data tree has a visibility toggle. Verification: Check toggle/visibility related description in response.

cases.input: Show the CTV mask overlay on the CT
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify CTV mask overlay display. Mechanism: CTV mask correctly overlays on CT. Verification: Check CTV mask overlay description in response.

cases.input: Reset the viewer to default settings
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify viewer reset function. Mechanism: User can restore viewer parameters to defaults. Verification: Check reset/default confirmation in response.

cases.input: Segment and show me the 3D reconstruction
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify 3D reconstruction after segmentation. Mechanism: 3D reconstruction auto/manual triggered after segmentation completes. Verification: Check segmentation and 3D reconstruction description in response.

cases.input: What is the current window width and level?
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify window width/level display. Mechanism: Shows current CT viewer window width/level parameters. Verification: Check response has window/width/level keywords.
